battleTraits.name: Reserve Contingent
battleTraits.effect: One of your Mortek Guard units is not set up during the deployment phase. Instead, from the third battle round onwards, it can use the 'Contingent Arrival' ability.

battleTraits.name: Contingent Arrival
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: Ossiarch Commands
battleTraits.effect: At the start of the battle round, you receive 2 Ossiarch command points. Each Ossiarch Command costs 1 Ossiarch command point to use. The same unit cannot use more than one Ossiarch Command in the same phase. At the end of the battle round, all remaining Ossiarch command points are lost.

enhancements.name: Empower Nadirite Weapons
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly Mortek Guard unit wholly within 12" of your general, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 5+, until the start of your next turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of that unit’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Unstoppable Commander
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly Mortek Guard unit wholly within 12" your general, then roll a dice.
enhancements.effect: On a 2+, add 3" to that unit’s Move characteristic this phase.

enhancements.name: Murderous Drive
enhancements.effect: Your general’s Soulreaper Scythe has Crit (2 Hits).

enhancements.name: Marrowpact
enhancements.effect: Each time your general uses a Fight ability, after all of their attacks have been resolved, Heal (X) your general where X is the number of damage points allocated by those attacks.

regimentAbilities.name: Impenetrable Ranks
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to ward rolls for that unit.

regimentAbilities.name: Re-form Ranks
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly Mortek Guard unit in combat to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: That unit can use a Retreat ability this phase without any mortal damage being inflicted on it.

abilities.name: Drain Vitality
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by the target unit until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Reknit Construct
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit and that is not in combat to be the target.
abilities.effect: Heal (D3) the target. If the target unit is not damaged, you can instead return a number of slain models to it that have a combined Health characteristic of D3 or less.

abilities.name: Nadirite Assault
abilities.effect: Until the end of the phase, this unit’s melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits).

abilities.name: Deathrider Wedge
abilities.effect: Models in this unit can pass across enemy Infantry models as if this unit had Fly. After this unit has charged, you can pick an enemy unit that it passed across and roll a dice. On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit.

abilities.name: Bone Harvest
abilities.effect: Each time an enemy model in combat with this unit is slain, this unit gains 1 bone-tithe point. It can never have more than 6 bone-tithe points.

abilities.name: Repair Construct
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly Mortek Guard unit within 6" of this unit to be the target. Then, roll a dice for each bone-tithe point this unit has.
abilities.effect: For each 4+, you can return 1 slain model to the target unit. Then, reset this unit’s bone-tithe points to 0.
